parsed.production_notes: The video uses clips from the popular Bollywood movie '3 Idiots'. The footage is clearly professionally shot film, not AI-generated.

characters.appearance: A man in his late 30s or early 40s with a fair complexion, lean to medium build, and prominent facial features. He has dark eyes and short, dark hair, though his hairstyle changes between scenes (from a buzz cut to a slightly longer style).
characters.wardrobe: In the 'before' state, he wears a simple, loose-fitting white tunic. In the 'after' state, he wears a pale yellow t-shirt with a faint graphic print on the chest.
characters.demeanor: His demeanor shifts dramatically from extreme distress, frustration, and confusion to calm, serious, and confident.

scenes.setting: Top panel: A brightly lit, sterile-looking room, possibly a hospital or institution. Bottom panel: An engineering workshop or classroom with machinery in the background.
scenes.camera: Split-screen with medium close-ups in both panels.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up shot of Character A in a brightly lit, white-walled room. He has a very short buzz cut and is wearing a simple white tunic. The scene is a montage of his distress: he looks down at a tablet with a furrowed brow, looks up in confusion, gestures helplessly, screams in frustration, and finally collapses onto a bed, crying. The lighting is cool and clinical.

A static medium shot of Character A standing in what appears to be a university workshop or lab. He has short, styled dark hair and wears a pale yellow t-shirt. He looks directly at the camera with a serious, slightly challenging expression. In the background, there are large, blue and green industrial machines and windows letting in daylight.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen video with a black background. The top panel shows a montage of a man (Character A) in a white tunic becoming increasingly frustrated and distressed. The bottom panel shows a static image of the same man, now in a yellow t-shirt, looking confident in a workshop. Text overlays in Hindi are present next to each panel.
scenes.audio_transcript:
[dramatic, tense music]

Character A says: [Screaming and crying in frustration]
scenes.on_screen_text:
कोचिंग क्लासेस पर हज़ारों रुपये खर्च करने के बाद मेरी इंग्लिश (My English after spending thousands on coaching classes)

MySivi ऐप पर सिर्फ 3 रुपये का ट्रायल लेने के बाद मेरी इंग्लिश (My English after taking a 3 rupee trial on the MySivi app)

scenes.setting: Top panel: A brightly lit, sterile-looking room. Bottom panel: An engineering workshop or classroom.
scenes.camera: Split-screen. Top panel is static. Bottom panel cuts between a medium shot of the speaker and reaction shots of listeners.

panels.panel_visual_description: A static medium close-up shot of Character A, wearing a white tunic, hunched over and crying in a brightly lit, white-walled room. His face is partially obscured as he looks down in despair. The shot remains unchanged from the end of the previous scene.

A series of shots in a university workshop. It starts with a medium shot of Character A in a yellow t-shirt, speaking confidently. The camera then cuts to a medium shot of an older man in a light blue checkered shirt and glasses, looking shocked. It cuts again to a young man in a blue collared shirt, looking confused and concerned. The final shot returns to Character A, who maintains a serious, unwavering expression as he finishes speaking.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen video. The top panel remains a static image of the distressed man crying. The bottom panel now plays a video clip where the confident man (Character A) recites a long, complex English sentence flawlessly. The clip includes reaction shots of a shocked professor and a confused student. The same Hindi text overlays remain on screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: Instruments that record, analyze, summarize, organize, debate, and explain information that is illustrative, non-illustrative, hardbound, paperback, jacketed and non-jacketed, with forward, introduction, table of contents, index, that are intended for the enlightenment, understanding, enrichment, enhancement, and education of the human brain through the sensory route of vision.
